purpose: Define the narrow exact-data path needed to test H-A2 on the already-downloaded 2022-10 option quotes without turning SPY 1-minute bars into the hypothesis itself.
hypothesis_first_statement: H-A2 asks whether the SPY 0DTE ORB edge is conditional on macro/VIX risk state. SPY 1-minute bars are required only for exact ORB timing, path reconstruction, and timestamp-aligned option fills.
exact_inference_gap: The project has 2022-10 0DTE option quotes and regime labels, but cannot run the exact 2022-10 ORB stress rerun until SPY 1-minute underlying bars for the same window pass coverage, timestamp, provenance, and import validation.

planned_scope.full_window_required_reason: The 13 quote-available dates are the minimum exact-rerun target, but the full 21-day October 2022 window is required to audit no-trade days, quote-missing days, regime labels, and accidental survivorship/filtering effects.

why_1_minute_bars_are_required: The ORB rule uses the 9:30-9:35 ET opening range and breakout ordering.
Exact entry timing cannot be reconstructed from daily, 15-minute, or 5-minute proxy bars without changing the tested mechanism.
Stop/target path and 3:45 PM ET forced-close logic require intraday path information.
Option quote selection must be aligned to the underlying decision timestamp to avoid lookahead.

source_execution_order.description: Rescan local normalized/raw roots for 2022-10 SPY 1-minute bars before any external request.
Implement a bounded acquisition/import tool with fixture tests, dry-run mode, source manifest writing, timestamp conversion, and canonical spy_bar output validation before any live IBKR request.
Use the existing IBKR account only for a data-only historical-bars request if local TWS/Gateway is listening and Python client readiness passes.
If IBKR cannot be made available, stop and create a new source decision for Alpaca, FirstRate Data, Alpha Vantage, Massive/Polygon-style aggregates, Tiingo, or another source.

allowed_next_action: Implement and test the bounded H-A2 2022 SPY bar acquisition/import tool in dry-run and fixture mode. Do not execute a live IBKR historical-bars request until readiness status is ready_for_manual_data_probe.
forbidden_actions: Do not request IBKR historical bars from this plan artifact alone before the bounded tool and readiness gate pass.
Do not buy 2022-09 option data while 2022-10 SPY underlying bars are unresolved.
Do not buy or use a new provider without explicit user approval.
Do not transmit orders or enable broker execution.
Do not run exact H-A2 stress diagnostics until SPY bars pass coverage, timestamp, provenance, import, and option-join validation.
Do not approve paper trading, operational validation, real-money trading, or an H-A2 edge claim from this plan.
